category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a search tool like grep and The Silver Searcher; official GitHub README describes ripgrep as a line-oriented recursive search tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ripgrep; official repository title/README uses ripgrep.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README links to GUIDE.md as the User Guide and contains documentation quick links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep; per instruction it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists rg; source_facts.description and official README identify recursive regex search behavior similar to grep.
